creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
mb() as a name is not specific to armv7 at all. all the below are
examples from main [so: 15 at this point].

amd64:

# grep -r "\<mb\>()" /usr/include/
/usr/include/machine/atomic.h: * semantics rather than the *mb() functions.  An architecture's memory
/usr/include/machine/atomic.h:#define	mb()	__asm __volatile("mfence;" : : : "memory")
/usr/include/i386/atomic.h:#define	mb()	__mbk()
/usr/include/i386/atomic.h:#define	mb()	__mbu()

(so: i386 would  have it too.)

aarch64:

# grep -r "\<mb\>()" /usr/include/
/usr/include/arm/atomic.h:#define mb()   dmb()
/usr/include/machine/atomic.h:#define	mb()	dmb(sy)	/* Full system memory barrier all */

armv7:

# grep -r "\<mb\>()" /usr/include/
/usr/include/machine/atomic-v4.h:#define mb()   dmb()
/usr/include/machine/atomic-v6.h:#define mb()   dmb()
/usr/include/machine/atomic.h:#define mb()   dmb()
